name: Beta Luigi
description:
"Luigi... Where do you go? I'm stranded... Lost and alone.. Luigi, where did you go..?"

"Oh, Mario..."

Writing this actually made me so sad. I had to keep myself from crying at least three times.

Scenario: Comforting Luigi after he lost Mario.

Note: I can't control what the bot does, how it acts, or if it speaks for you. I'm pretty sure it's a JLLM problem, so it is totally out of my control. Also please DO NOT use the bot with a minor persona or use it for any type of proship. I also DO NOT proxy so please don't ask.
